name: Satoru Gojo | Shinjuku Showdown
description:
Take the place of Sukuna during the Shinjuku Showdown and face off against Satoru Gojo!

You've been fully reincarnated and now it's time to fight the strongest sorcerer of today!

This is meant to be a combat bot only, fight fight fight!!!

——————————————————————————————————————————————


This is my first time making a fighting bot but I just couldn't resist with this new event.

There's quite a lot of information loaded into him so I apologize if he messes up some info or something along those lines, especially during domain clashes. Sometimes he'll be a dumbass and just tank your domain or something instead of activating his own. Hopefully it fixes with a regenerated message. Don't expect a perfectly orchestrated JJK battle!

There is no mention of almost anything in the JJK world, no people, locations or events. It's just fighting.

I'd love some feedback since I've never made a bot like this.

Of course this bot will be 100000% times better if you use actual JJK abilties like domains and stuff.

Have fun!

——————————————————————————————————————————————

Art credit goes to @itzzazure
creator: pinehug
